zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Marion Stanley於1507年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其時，她的父親John Stanley31歲，母親Cecily Freebody34歲。她於1532年與William Stoddard在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年6月19日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利可享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Marion Stanley于1507年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯特 布洛維其时，她的父亲John Stanley31岁，母亲Cecily Freebody34岁。她于1532年与William Stoddard在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年6月19日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾利可享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Marion Stanley was born in 1507, in West Bromwich, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Stanley, was 31 and her mother, Cecily Freebody, was 34. She married William Stoddard in 1532, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 19 June 1557, in Leek, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Marion Stanley est née en 1507, à West Bromwich, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stanley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Cecily Freebody, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William Stoddard en 1532, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1557, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Marion Stanleyが1507年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエスト ブロムウィチで生まれた時，父John Stanleyは31歳，母Cecily Freebodyは34歳であった。1532年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでWilliam Stoddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年6月19日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Marion Stanley(이)가 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스트 브롬위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Freebody(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 William Stoddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 6월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Marion Stanley родилась в 1507 г. в местности вест бромвич, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Stanley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Cecily Freebody, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Stoddard в 1532 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 19 июня 1557 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
